rumors.text: The Baron's wig is actually a trained spider.
The local priest accepts donations in copper pieces only.
There's a secret tunnel from the tavern to the castle.
The baker's bread makes you temporarily invisible.
The town well is haunted by a disgruntled water elemental.
Someone's been stealing the left shoe from every pair in town.
The blacksmith is actually a retired dragon in human form.
Every mirror in town shows you 5 years younger.
The local bard is secretly funding the adventurers' guild.
There's a ghost in the library who only haunts bad poetry.
The King is actually three goblins in a trench coat.
The Queen has outlawed the color purple on Tuesdays.
The royal tax collector is a vampire.
The next election will be decided by trial by combat.
The Duke is secretly funding both sides of the war.
The kingdom's borders are shifting 1 inch per day.
The royal advisor is a polymorphed owl.
New law: All dragons must register as small businesses.
The crown prince is missing and nobody's noticed.
The kingdom is actually a simulation created by wizards.
Gold pieces are losing value due to dragon hoarding.
The Merchant's Guild is manipulating potion prices.
A new currency made of dragon scales is being introduced.
Healing potions will be rationed next month.
The local bank is actually a lich's phylactery.
Inflation is caused by too many +1 swords in circulation.
The Adventurer's Guild is going public on the Waterdeep Stock Exchange.
Magic items are now subject to luxury tax.
A monopoly on torches has been declared illegal.
The price of arrows doubled after a rogue's union strike.
There's a dungeon under the old mill that's never been cleared.
A legendary sword is hidden in the mayor's basement.
The local quest board hasn't been updated in 50 years.
A party of adventurers went into the forest and never came out.
There's a treasure map tattooed on someone in this tavern.
The ancient ruins glow blue during a full moon.
A wizard is offering 10,000gp for a specific goblin's left ear.
The cursed amulet everyone's seeking is already in town.
There's a portal to the Feywild in the old oak tree.
The dungeon's boss is on vacation until next month.
A red dragon has been spotted near the northern pass.
Goblins are unionizing and demanding better working conditions.
The local owlbear is actually two animals in a costume.
A beholder is running the local eye clinic.
Werewolves are exempt from the full moon curfew.
The swamp witch accepts payment in memories.
A troll is working as a bouncer at the fancy district.
Dragons now accept cryptocurrency for hoard insurance.
The local mimic population has infiltrated the furniture district.
A mind flayer is running the town's therapy practice.
Casting fireball indoors is now a misdemeanor.
The local wizard's tower has more floors on the inside.
Potions expire after 30 days and turn into poison.
There's a spell that can make your hair grow back instantly.
The archmage is actually 12 gnomes in a robe.
Magic missiles are causing a shortage of small birds.
Scrolls of resurrection come with a 30-day money-back guarantee.
The local ley lines are causing WiFi interference.
A cursed mirror shows you your alternate universe self.
Teleportation circles require a subscription service now.
The baker needs yeast from a Giant's cave (Giant is on keto).
Town crier lost his voice. Suspected curse. Needs removal.
Statue in the square changes pose every night. Investigate.
Stray dog is actually a polymorphed noble. Break curse.
Festival prize stolen before judging. Find the thief.
Orphanage needs donations or monster clearing.
Bridge collapse blamed on rust monster. Hunt it.
Local hero's statue coming to life. Contain it.
Baker's bread rising too fast. Yeast elemental in oven?
Town drunk claims he slew a god. Verify or silence.
Ambassador needs escort to the border. High pay.
Treaty document stolen from the vault. Retrieve it.
Rebels planning to storm the armory. Stop them.
New law requires all swords to be registered. Enforce it.
Spy network discovered in the post office. Expose them.
King's tax collector is missing. Find him (alive).
Ambassador demands tribute of rare wine. Fetch it.
Election ballots eaten by mimic. Find the mimic.
Merchant needs protection from rival guild. Bodyguard duty.
Counterfeit gold pieces circulating. Find the source.
Silk road blocked by giant spiders. Clear the path.
Innkeeper needs help evicting a squatter (it's a lich).
Gem mine flooded with water elementals. Drain it.
Caravan late by two weeks. Send search party.
Smugglers using portable holes. Confiscate them.
Price of steel spikes skyrocketing. Investigate monopoly.
Bank vault door stuck. Need strong party to open.
Cave entrance opened after earthquake. Explore it.
Legendary hero's tomb location deciphered. Loot it.
Quest board has a blank paper that glows. Touch it.
Old mine reopened, miners hearing singing. Silence it.
Treasure chest found floating in river. Retrieve it.
Old temple bell ringing underground. Investigate.
Arena needs new challengers for weekend. Sign up.
Dungeon map sold by a blind beggar. Verify it.
Wyvern nesting on the bell tower. Remove it.
Ogre demanding toll at the bridge. Negotiate or kill.
Chimera spotted near the sheep pasture. Hunt it.
Kobolds digging under the bank. Stop them.
Griffon attacking mail delivery birds. Ground it.
Troll under bridge wants union rep. Mediate.
Beholder eye stalks found in the market. Find the body.
Druid circle reporting missing treants. Find them.
Goblins selling knock-off healing potions. Raid them.
Displacer beast stealing livestock. Track it.
Wild magic zone appeared in the park. Contain it.
Potion shop exploded, need cleanup crew. Hazard pay.
Scroll of resurrection found in a gutter. Return it.
Wizard tower floating away slowly. Anchor it.
Enchanted sword won't stop singing. Disenchant it.
Potion of invisibility stuck permanent. Fix it.
Teleportation circle sending people to wrong city. Repair it.
Cursed mirror trapping reflections. Break it.
Apprentice turned himself into a teapot. Reverse it.
Magic broom sweeping uncontrollably. Stop it.
